name: domain
description: Maintain UPPERCASE <NAME>.md (snapshot = `@goal:` final-goal declaration + `- [ ]` progress milestones) + sister <NAME>.log.md (append-only step log) at project root. NAME = UPPERCASE-start + UPPERCASE/digits/`_`/`-`/`+` (e.g. `TTR-MN`, `TTR_MN`, `RTSC+HTS`); `+` enables meta-domain composition (`RTSC+HTS` → RTSC+HTS.md + RTSC+HTS.log.md). Subcommands: /domain init <NAME> (scaffold files) · /domain set <NAME> (select session active — bare /domain <NAME> shortcut) · /domain goal <text> (declare the FINAL goal — sets the snapshot's `@goal:` line) · /domain milestone <text> (alias ms — add `- [ ]` progress milestone) · /domain done <match> (flip a milestone [ ]→[x], else flip a log task) · /domain (show active + @goal + progress bar `▓▓▓░░ NN% · done/total` + lint) · /domain todo <task> / <task> / new <header> (log). Lint: warns if snapshot has no `@goal:` OR no milestones. Progress = milestone completion (snapshot), not log-based. Path resolution: a domain pair lives EITHER at the repo root (`<NAME>.md`) OR in a self-contained folder (`<NAME>/<NAME>.md`) — every verb resolves in order (1) existing root `<NAME>.md` → (2) existing folder-nested `<NAME>/<NAME>.md` → (3) root default (fresh scaffold), with the log following the snapshot's directory, so folder-nested meta-domains no longer regenerate an empty root scaffold on each call.
